title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-contained LLM runner that bundles Llama-2, CodeLlama, Mistral, etc. into one CLI with Docker-style model pulls.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers (via proxy) to chat with local Ollama models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, multi-user, model manager, OpenAI-compat endpoint).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s REST API for chat, embeddings and model ops.

title: ollama-cli-crystal
summary: Crystal-lang CLI for Ollama with built-in progress bars and model search.

title: ollama-chatbot (discord)
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-copilot.vim
summary: Experimental fork adding Ollama backend to Vim Copilot plugin for offline code suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-desktop (Tauri)
summary: Lightweight cross-platform desktop app built with Tauri and React for chatting with Ollama.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for offline AI note assistance using Ollama models.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama binaries and a NixOS module for declarative model management.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-cdktf
summary: CDKTF (Terraform CDK) construct library to deploy Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio and async-stream support.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP library wrapping Ollama for Phoenix LiveView chat apps.

title: ollama-slackbot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via threads and mentions.
